author: dexhunter
name: Improved TTT + HedgeMixer: Per-Layer LR Groups + Cosine Schedule
blurb: Built on PR #720. Improves test-time training with per-layer LR groups (3x for output projections, 0.5x for input), cosine schedule, reduced block freezing, and 4 TTT epochs. 3-seed mean 1.0722 BPB on 8xH100 in under 600s eval.
